body.title: Memory lifecycle decay pass in dreaming.py — archive stale low-activation memories
body.result: _archive_stale_memories() added to dreaming.py; metadata.archived=true for age>90d + score<0.1 memories; PROCEDURAL exempt; called from run()
body.description:
clan.memories grows unbounded. activate.py has last_activated_at and activation_score columns but nothing ever prunes. xMemory paper names memory lifecycle management as 'the next wave of work' — validating it as a real bottleneck. Without decay, semantic search noise accumulates over time.

Add _archive_stale_memories() helper to dreaming.py, called from run() after synthesis step (alongside T-dreaming-wg-hebbian's _strengthen_coactivated_edges). Implementation:
1. Query clan.memories WHERE last_activated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '%s days' AND activation_score < %s AND memory_type NOT IN ('PROCEDURAL') — PROCEDURAL memories (habits) are exempt.
2. UPDATE clan.memories SET metadata = jsonb_set(metadata, '{archived}', 'true') WHERE id = ANY(%s).
3. Log count of archived memories.
Configurable: IGOR_MEMORY_DECAY_DAYS (default 90), IGOR_MEMORY_DECAY_SCORE_THRESHOLD (default 0.1).
Non-blocking: wrap in try/except, log error, continue dreaming if step fails.
Note: this is a parallel addition to T-dreaming-wg-hebbian (different function, different call in run()) — no conflict; sprint sequentially after T-dreaming-wg-hebbian to avoid merge confusion.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/dreaming.py (add helper + call in run())
**Design rules:** non-blocking on failure; PROCEDURAL memories exempt; configurable threshold + interval via env; archived flag in metadata (not hard delete — Discworld principle: repair, don't discard)
**Scope boundary:** In: stale-memory archive query, metadata flag set, log. Out: hard deletion, pruning PROCEDURAL memories, changing consolidation, changing activation scoring.
**Test plan:** Mock clan.memories with one node last_activated > 90d ago and activation_score < 0.1 → after run(), metadata.archived = true. PROCEDURAL node with same age → NOT archived. Node last_activated 30d ago → NOT archived. Exception in _archive_stale_memories does not abort dreaming run().
